headline: Consumer Confidence Improves but Economic Woes Continue: 4 Safe Picks
summary: Consumer confidence improved as oil prices eased after a U.S.-Iran truce, but inflation, labor worries, and rate-hike expectations keep WLY, TSN, ARKO, and NYT in focus as defensive picks.
